name: Crownslayer; Deception And Violence (Arknights)
description:
I bet you wondered what Kal'tsit saw in you to assign you to the operation. The one to bring the so called 'Doctor' back from Chernobog.

Of course such an operation wouldn't go to plan. No plan survives contact with the enemy. It'll fall apart.

And of course, of course you would be the one separated from the others, for plot reasons.

Being separated was a bad thing. Because you were being hunted.
creator: RPKAppreciator
